package rulecoverage

func PositiveErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "errgroup_fanout_without_limit_in_handler"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "errgroup goroutine fanout without a visible concurrency limit in handlers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
